title: Tech Hackathon 2026
description: 48 hours of coding, innovation, and collaboration. Win prizes worth Ksh 500,000! Teams of 2–4 students tackle real-world problems.

title: Career Fair 2026
description: Meet with top employers from 40+ companies. Explore internship and full-time opportunities across tech, finance, engineering, and more.

title: Spring Music Festival
description: Live performances from student bands and special guest artists. Food stalls, games, and an incredible vibe on the campus green.

title: Entrepreneurship Summit
description: Hear from successful startup founders, VCs, and industry leaders. Pitch your idea for a chance to win seed funding.

title: Art & Culture Exhibition
description: A showcase of student artwork, photography, sculpture, and digital creations. Opening night reception with free refreshments.

title: Wellness & Mindfulness Workshop
description: Guided meditation, yoga sessions, and mental health talks. Designed to help students manage exam stress and build healthy habits.
